prompt: A lone traveler wearing a conical hat iteratively stepping down the steepest slopes of a cascading sequence of mountain ravines, moving steadily toward the very bottom of the deepest, darkest valley floor. Authentic Edo period Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print. Katsushika Hokusai compositional diagonals tracking descent, flat areas of unmodulated indigo and Prussian blue color, visible woodgrain texture (bokashi), stark figure-ground contrast, crisp black outlines. No modern elements, no text, strictly historical visual grammar. Style: Risograph
tradition_approach: Katsushika Hokusai compositional diagonals tracking the steepest path of descent, flat Prussian blue zones, visible woodgrain bokashi gradients, and crisp black block outlines.
